etymology.description: semantic 鬼(鬼) (guǐ, "demon") + phonetic 麻(麻) (má) -> demon; magic
etymology.interpretation: The character 魔(mó, "demon; magic") combines the semantic element 鬼(鬼) (guǐ, "demon"), which suggests the idea of spirits or supernatural beings, with the phonetic element 麻(麻) (má), borrowing its sound. The composite evokes concepts of demonic or magical nature, reinforcing the core meanings of 'demon' and 'magic.'

examples.chinese: 夜晚森林里传来了奇怪的魔声(夜晚森林裡傳來了奇怪的魔聲)。
examples.pinyin: Yèwǎn sēnlín lǐ chuán lái le qíguài de mó shēng.
examples.english: Strange demon sounds came from the forest at night.

examples.chinese: 这个游戏里有很多魔法效果(這個遊戲裡有很多魔法效果)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège yóuxì lǐ yǒu hěn duō mófǎ xiàoguǒ.
examples.english: This game features many magic effects.

examples.chinese: 传说中的魔王在山顶等着勇者(傳說中的魔王在山頂等著勇者)。
examples.pinyin: Chuánshuō zhōng de mówáng zài shāndǐng děngzhe yǒngzhě.
examples.english: The legendary demon king is waiting for the hero on the mountain top.
